objective: Test whether a single transcription-free raw-speech/audio-to-vision contrastive route yields participant-disjoint real-pairing lift over both a matched nonoverlapping within-recording time shift and a participant-excluding matched shuffle.
claim_boundary: A pass may motivate a separately authorized locked evaluation and eventual simulated cue-lift study under temporal, visual, and audiovisual distributions provisionally calibrated to ChildLens ages 3-5. It is not evidence of infant calibration or validated naturalistic German lexical grounding.

method_selection.selection_basis: documented methodological suitability plus successful synthetic local loading and inference only; no ChildLens audiovisual score was inspected

audio_frontend.output: mean last-hidden-state over valid time steps, 768 dimensions
audio_frontend.pretraining_note: self-supervised raw 16 kHz speech audio; no ChildLens ancestry

vision_frontend.output: mean of per-frame pooler outputs after per-frame L2 normalization, then L2 normalize, 384 dimensions
vision_frontend.pretraining_note: self-supervised image features; no ChildLens ancestry

learned_components.loss: symmetric in-batch audio-to-vision and vision-to-audio InfoNCE

primary_sources.suitability: self-supervised representations learned from raw speech audio without transcripts
general-purpose self-supervised visual features usable without task labels

primary_sources.citation: Morgado et al. (2021), Audio-Visual Instance Discrimination
primary_sources.suitability: cross-modal contrastive discrimination of co-occurring audio and video

development_split.method: within each immutable source cohort, sort SHA256(split_seed|cohort|participant_key); assign first 3 to evaluation and all remaining to train
development_split.split_must_be_frozen_before: media decoding, frontend embedding, training, or audiovisual outcome scoring

windows.candidate_source: released timed ChildLens speech-like sample segments already bound in the immutable v2 and v3 development manifests
windows.candidate_rule: one centered 4-second window per released segment shorter than 4 seconds; deterministic contiguous 4-second windows within longer segments
windows.overlap_resolution: chronological greedy retention by start then end then row hash

video.timestamps: window_start + 0.5, 1.5, 2.5, and 3.5 seconds, EgoBabyVLM-compatible midpoint convention
video.preprocessing: pinned DINOv2 processor: RGB, shortest edge 256, center crop 224, ImageNet normalization

within_recording_time_shift.direction: first direction from SHA256(split_seed|shift|row_key), then opposite direction if needed

cross_participant_shuffle.paired_modality: real audio with another evaluation participant's real video
cross_participant_shuffle.matching_cost: 4*activity_mismatch + 2*location_mismatch + absolute speech-density difference + 0.1*absolute normalized recording-position difference
cross_participant_shuffle.solver: deterministic minimum-cost bipartite assignment; infeasible same-participant edges forbidden

controls.shortcut_rule: real-over-shuffle without real-over-within-recording-shift is failure, never evidence of alignment

training.pairing: real audio-real video only on development-train participants
training.batch_construction: one deterministic cycling window per train participant per step
training.model_selection: none; fixed final epoch for every seed
training.score_aggregation: mean projected cosine per row across the three frozen seeds

timing_perturbation.operation: shift audio and video window together when within recording bounds; run identical decoders and frozen frontends

uncertainty_and_metrics.primary_alignment_metric: participant mean real projected cosine minus within-recording-shift projected cosine
uncertainty_and_metrics.secondary_alignment_metric: participant mean real projected cosine minus cross-participant-shuffle projected cosine
uncertainty_and_metrics.seed_directional_stability: at least two of three seed-specific mean lifts must be positive for each control

participant_clustered_model_independent: released speech-bout duration, density, gaps, and speech seconds per observation minute
coarse activity duration and recurrence plus privacy-safe activity/location shares
released speech-activity overlap and audiovisual candidate-event density where supported
grayscale adjacent-frame motion, persistence, and scene-change rate
retained audio duration, RMS energy, non-silent fraction, and clipped-sample fraction
transcription_free_model_based: paired retrieval rates and reciprocal rank

privacy.raw_and_restricted_location: existing owner-private local ChildLens quarantine only
public_forbidden: participant session item or row identifiers
privacy.public_artifacts: aggregate summaries and cryptographic receipts only

stop_rules: Evaluate gates in order and fail closed.
If G0 or G1 fails, do not decode, embed, or train.
If G2 fails, do not train or score audiovisual outcomes.
If G3 fails, preserve a terminal NO-GO even if real exceeds the shuffled control.
If G4 or G5 fails, preserve a terminal NO-GO.
No failure authorizes a model swap, threshold change, additional recording, locked evaluation, simulator generation, or side-cue condition training.
A full development pass recommends only a separately authorized locked evaluation.
